body:
Dear Acme,

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience caused due to the delay in your delivery associated with complaint ID CMP-2025-00089. We understand how important timely deliveries are to your business, and regret falling short of expectations.

Our team has been actively working to address this, and we’ve confirmed that the revised delivery date with BlueDart is now set for 2025-11-28. Additionally, as a gesture of goodwill, we’ve applied a credit of 2,299.5 INR to your account to acknowledge the disruption and to thank you for your patience.

Please rest assured, we are taking steps to ensure such issues are minimized in the future and remain committed to serving your organization with excellence.

We truly value your continued trust in Acme Retail Pvt Ltd and appreciate your understanding.

Warm regards,  
[Your Name]  
Customer Experience Team  
Acme Retail Pvt Ltd
